workflows.title: Interactive TUI Workflow
workflows.description: Use OpenCode's terminal UI for interactive development
steps: Review file edits with diff preview before applying

workflows.title: Headless Mode for Scripting
workflows.description: Use -p flag for non-interactive, scriptable execution

workflows.title: Multi-Model Support
steps: Configure supported providers: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, Groq, Ollama
Choose best model for your use case

workflows.title: Git-Aware Context
workflows.description: Leverage git information for better understanding
steps: OpenCode reads git history and status
Better context for bug fixes and refactoring
Automatic diffs for review before applying

workflows.title: MCP Server Integration
steps: OpenCode can interact with external systems
Richer context and more powerful automation

proTips: Use TUI mode (-p is not specified) for complex tasks that need interaction
Use headless mode (-p) for CI/CD integration
Real-time file diffs in TUI let you review before applying
Supports multiple providers: always use the right tool for the job
MCP servers unlock powerful capabilities (filesystem, databases, APIs)
Git-aware context means better understanding of your codebase
Create .opencode.json for per-project configuration and consistency
Use Ctrl+N to start fresh conversations without reloading
Tab navigation makes it easy to switch between code and chat
Conversation history is preserved across sessions
Shell command execution is built-in to the TUI
Diff preview prevents accidental bad changes
